title: antennaria media subsp. compacta
intro: Antennaria media subsp. compacta, also known as mountain silver, is a compact subspecies of the Antennaria media plant, a flowering perennial native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds. The medicinal properties of Antennaria media subsp. compacta have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory infections, as well as to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
